title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indecent Representation of Women (Prohibition) Act, 1986. (2) It extends to the whole of India, 1***. (3) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10- 2019). 2. 2nd October, 1987, vide notification No G.S.R. 821(E), dated 25th September, 1987, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
